'''hazhama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetor|foetor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetor|foetor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hazhama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzhæmæth|hæzhæmæth]] || [[word:hæzhæmæj|hæzhæmæj]] || [[word:hæzhæmæsh|hæzhæmæsh]] || [[word:hæzhæmæ|hæzhæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhazhamath|hazhazhamath]] || [[word:hazhazhamaj|hazhazhamaj]] || [[word:hazhazhamash|hazhazhamash]] || [[word:hazhazhama|hazhazhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhamath|hazhamath]] || [[word:hazhamaj|hazhamaj]] || [[word:hazhamash|hazhamash]] || [[word:hazhama|hazhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhafmath|hazhafmath]] || [[word:hazhafmaj|hazhafmaj]] || [[word:hazhafmash|hazhafmash]] || [[word:hazhafmaf|hazhafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazhamatha|hazhamatha]] || [[word:hazhamaja|hazhamaja]] || [[word:hazhamasha|hazhamasha]] || [[word:hazhamaka|hazhamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazhamath|hazhamath]] || [[word:hazhamaj|hazhamaj]] || [[word:hazhamash|hazhamash]] || [[word:hazhama|hazhama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazhamathal|hazhamathal]] || [[word:hazhamajal|hazhamajal]] || [[word:hazhamashal|hazhamashal]] || [[word:hazhamakal|hazhamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazhamathatha|hazhamathatha]] || [[word:hazhamajaja|hazhamajaja]] || [[word:hazhamashasha|hazhamashasha]] || [[word:hazhamaka|hazhamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazhamathan|hazhamathan]] || [[word:hazhamajan|hazhamajan]] || [[word:hazhamashan|hazhamashan]] || [[word:hazhamakan|hazhamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazhamathaoro|hazhamathaoro]] || [[word:hazhamajaoro|hazhamajaoro]] || [[word:hazhamashaoro|hazhamashaoro]] || [[word:hazhamakaoro|hazhamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
